targets.query: from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value < 3.9 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value >= 3.9 and r._value <= 10.0 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value > 10.0 and r._value <= 13.9 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))

from(bucket: "cgmsharp") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "glucose" and r._field == "value") |> group() |> reduce(fn: (r, accumulator) => ({total: accumulator.total + 1.0, count: accumulator.count + (if r._value > 13.9 then 1.0 else 0.0)}), identity: {total: 0.0, count: 0.0}) |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r.count / r.total * 100.0}))
